examples: Clad in their black sweatsuits, the Maryland players had a steely determination.
"Cecco," he said in his most steely voice, "go back and fetch me out that doodle-doo."
She looked at me, eyes steely from trying not to cry.
Kirtley paid tribute to Moores and skipper Adams for instilling a steely determination into the squad.
The steely-eyed government agents in 24, the Fox TV series, sat in Humanscale chairs.
